race.comment: SHEZAIN (3) disappointed when last sighted at Rosehill in a CL3 Highway but did earn her spot there following back-to-back wins to kick off the prep. Gets a key booking in Heywood, who's unbeaten aboard. Taking seriously fresh. VIIPURI (1) showed little early speed then closed strongly to finish third last time out over this journey at Canberra. Rock-hard fit and draws well. Bold showing anticipated. WINNING RULET (5) was a determined maiden winner last time out when resuming over this trip at Kembla Grange. Is sure to have come on from that and should be making her presence felt. ELLISMAYNE (2) is open to sharp improvement second-up and is another of the main hopes.
